reviewer: vc-execute-agent (self-review against approved plan checklist + validate-contract)
rationale: All 6 Implementation Checklist sections implemented and their named test gates green. The load-bearing AC6 atomicity guarantee is proven both at runtime (forced-failure test, verified non-vacuous via negative control) and structurally (per-function line-order tripwire). Money-math, grant-atomicity, conditional-debit overspend guards, existing networkId columns/behavior, and apLabel()/revenueByAp() are all UNCHANGED. Migration is strictly additive (nullable TEXT, no FK/index/default) and verified column-by-column on the dev DB. One Hybrid gate leg remains open by design (AC7 agent browser pass + human verification handoff) — flagged, not skipped. One accepted known-gap (resolveCheckoutLocation fallback tiers 3-5 return apCircuitId null) documented. No auth/secret/trust-boundary surface touched; AP attribution remains best-effort/advisory (MAC-trust residual carried forward, never described as tamper-proof).
openItems: AC7 Agent-Probe leg: render Finance transactions page with seeded records of all 3 attribution states x 3 grant types + human verification handoff (browser-visible change — project rule).
Known-gap: durable circuit-id not cached on network_sessions/customer_profile for checkout fallback tiers 3-5 (apCircuitId null there). Backlog candidate.
